# ChengYen Wang — CV

> Technical Account Manager based in Beijing, China. 10+ years driving enterprise cloud adoption, large-scale migration, and digital transformation. AWS-certified across 6 specialties.

## About

ChengYen Wang is a Technical Account Manager with 10+ years of experience driving enterprise cloud adoption, large-scale migration, and digital transformation. Trusted advisor to senior stakeholders, leading cross-functional teams to deliver measurable business outcomes. Expertise in cloud architecture, IT operations, and AIOps, with proven success in improving system reliability, scalability, and cost efficiency. AWS-certified across 6 specialties.

## Contact

- Email: wchengyen0106@126.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/wchengyen
- AIOps project: https://github.com/wchengyen/kiro-devops
- Location: Beijing, China

## Core Focus Areas

- **Cloud**: AWS (6 specialties), Cloud Architecture & Migration, Large-scale Modernization, Cost Optimization (FinOps), Multi-region Resilience
- **AIOps**: AIOps Agent Platform (alert + agent automation), Incident Diagnosis Automation, Runbook Execution, Predictive Monitoring, MTTR Reduction
- **GenAI / AI**: GenAI Solution Design, LLM Inference (CPU-based), Dify Workflows on H20, Stable Diffusion / AIGC, Natural Language Operations
- **Customer-facing**: Technical Account Management (TAM), Pre-Sales & Post-Sales, Executive Stakeholder Management, Cross-functional Coordination, Critical Event Delivery
- **Industries served**: Internet & SaaS, Gaming, Healthcare, Education, Financial Services (ICBC, Minsheng Bank, PSBC)

## Experience

### NWCD (AWS China Region) — Technical Account Manager (Jan 2019 – Present, Beijing)
Key Industries: Internet, Gaming, Healthcare, SaaS, Education

- Spearheaded Enterprise On-Ramp Program, achieving 36% YoY customer growth and 50.8% AWS Usage fee growth by Q3 2025
- Directed large-scale cloud migration and modernization projects, achieving 30%+ cost reduction and improved system performance
- Coordinated across Support, Product, and SRE teams to deliver critical events (game launches, peak traffic), ensuring zero major incidents
- Resolved high-priority technical escalations, improving customer satisfaction for TAM to 100%

**AIOps / GenAI Innovation:**
- Designed and implemented an AIOps agent platform (alert + agent automation) for intelligent operations
- Automated incident diagnosis and runbook execution, reducing MTTR by 40%+
- Enabled natural language operations and predictive monitoring across cloud environments
- Designed custom solutions / POCs to resolve customer pain points by building Dify workflows in H20
- Delivered technical webinars and blogs on operations and GenAI topics

### Thomson Reuters — Technical Account Manager (Pre-Sales & Post-Sales) (Sep 2015 – Dec 2018, Beijing)
Key Accounts: ICBC, China Minsheng Bank, Postal Savings Bank of China

- Defined technical strategies and architectures for major financial institutions (ICBC, Minsheng Bank, PSBC)
- Partnered with account teams to drive solution adoption and long-term customer success

### IBM — Senior IT Specialist (Pre-Sales) (Feb 2008 – Sep 2015, Taipei, Taiwan)

- Delivered core banking system upgrades and architecture transformations
- Improved system performance, availability, and cross-region architecture resilience

### Earlier Roles

- Software Engineer at ShineWave (2008)
- Intern at Moker (2007)

## AWS Certificates (7)

1. AWS Certified Developer – Associate
2. AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate
3. AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional (SAP)
4. AWS Certified Big Data – Specialty (BDS)
5. AWS Certified Database – Specialty (DBS)
6. AWS Certified Security – Specialty (SCS)
7. AWS Certified Machine Learning – Specialty (MLS)

## Public Sharing

### AIOps Agent Platform (https://github.com/wchengyen/kiro-devops)
Multi-component agent platform for intelligent cloud operations — automated alert triage, incident diagnosis, and runbook execution. Reduced MTTR by 40%+.

### Dify Workflow POCs on H20 (Enterprise Customers, 2024)
Custom GenAI POCs built with Dify on H20 to address specific enterprise pain points — workflow-based solutions for alert triage, knowledge retrieval, customer support.

### CPU-based LLM Inference Webinar (2024-08)
Public technical session on deploying LLM inference services on CPU-only infrastructure for cost-sensitive workloads.

### Stable Diffusion / AIGC Webinar (2023-04)
https://www.nwcdcloud.cn/playback.aspx?id=51
Public technical session on hands-on Stable Diffusion for image generation, demystifying AIGC for enterprise audiences.

### NWCD Public Blog: 建构自动化运维手册和操作手册实现卓越运营 (2022-12)
https://www.nwcdcloud.cn/articledetail.aspx?id=31
Authored blog on building automated operations and runbooks to achieve operational excellence.

### AWS China Customer Story (Public Reference)
https://www.amazonaws.cn/customer-stories/reduce-cost-and-increase-efficiency/
Public customer-success story on AWS China (NWCD), covering cost reduction and efficiency gains for an enterprise customer.

## Education

- **University of Florida – Warrington College of Business** — Master of Science in Decision & Information Science (Dec 2007, GPA 3.66/4.0). Teaching Assistant for Database Systems (1 year).
- **National Central University (NCU)** — Bachelor of Business Administration in Management Information Systems (Fall 2003). Managed IT infrastructure for the School of Management (2 years).
